Q3 Roadmap DRAFT

This is what reviewing a plan as HTML looks like instead of staring at raw markdown in a chat.

Goals

  • Ship the ingest rewrite
  • Cut the long-tail of stale alerts
  • Migrate two services off the legacy DB

Non-goals

  • New product surface
  • Refactoring auth (out of scope this quarter)
